mapper.select: select data_id, instance_id, template_id, form_data, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from biz_form_data where data_id = #{dataId}
select data_id, instance_id, template_id, form_data, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from biz_form_data where instance_id = #{instanceId}
mapper.insert: insert into biz_form_data (instance_id, template_id, form_data, create_by, create_time) values (#{instanceId}, #{templateId}, #{formData}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
